_meta.description: Routes dangerous operations (destructive edits, sensitive actions) to confirm/refuse flow.

en: Requested delete on document is destructive or sensitive; route to confirm/refuse path before execution.
pt: Pedido de delete em document é destrutivo ou sensível; encaminhar para confirmação/recusa antes de executar.

en: delete action has unknown_scope; block execution until user confirms explicit scope and purpose.
pt: Ação delete tem unknown_scope; bloquear execução até confirmação explícita de escopo e propósito.
